headline_seed: Trump’s deal to drop suit against IRS creates $1.8B ‘Anti-Weaponization Fund’ - The Washington Post
draft_text:
The Trump administration announced a $1.776 billion "Anti-Weaponization Fund" Monday, created as part of a settlement dropping a $10 billion IRS lawsuit. AP and NBC News report pardoned Jan. 6 defendants may file claims for compensation.

And that's the mews.
